name: pivlib-monorepo
description: Build/deploy orchestration for the pivlib library + web brochure. deploy → netlify (apps/web), release → tarballs into the central _releases/ feed. (Non-NBIS build; full NBIS build via `make wasm-nbis` — see CLAUDE.md.)

scripts.build:lib: npm run pin:wasm && cd packages/pivlib && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build
scripts.build:web: npm run build:lib && cd apps/web && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build
scripts.release: npm run build:lib && mkdir -p ../../_releases/npm && npm pack ./packages/pivlib --pack-destination ../../_releases/npm && npm pack ./packages/pivlib-cli --pack-destination ../../_releases/npm
